5iZfKj.name: All The Small Things
5iZfKj.notes: nach 2. ref. direkt interlude; ; Intro; Verse 1; Bridge; Chorus; Intro; Verse 2; Bridge; Chorus; Interlude; Power-Bridge; Ende
5iZfKj.audio_ref: audio/All The Small Things/All The Small Things - Full Song.mp3
5iZfKj.audio_ref_name: All The Small Things - Full Song.mp3
5iZfKj.lyrics_raw:
[Verse 1: Tom DeLonge]
All the small things
True care, truth brings
I'll take one lift
Your ride, best trip
Always, I know
You'll be at my show
Watching, waiting
Commiserating

[Pre-Chorus: Tom DeLonge]
Say it ain't so, I will not go
Turn the lights off, carry me home

[Chorus: Tom DeLonge & Mark Hoppus]
Na-na, na-na, na-na, na-na, na, na
Na-na, na-na, na-na, na-na, na, na
Na-na, na-na, na-na, na-na, na, na
Na-na, na-na, na-na, na-na, na, na

[Verse 2: Tom DeLonge]
Late night, come home
Work sucks, I know
She left me roses by the stairs
Surprises let me know she cares

You might also like

Family Matters
Drake

So Long, London
Taylor Swift

But Daddy I Love Him
Taylor Swift

[Pre-Chorus: Tom DeLonge]
Just say it ain't so, I will not go
Turn the lights off, carry me home

[Chorus: Tom DeLonge & Mark Hoppus]
Na-na, na-na, na-na, na-na, na, na
Na-na, na-na, na-na, na-na, na, na
Na-na, na-na, na-na, na-na, na, na
Na-na, na-na, na-na, na-na, na, na

[Instrumental Break]

[Bridge: Tom DeLonge & Mark Hoppus]
Say it ain't so, I will not go
Turn the lights off, carry me home
Keep your head still, I'll be your thrill
The night will go on, my little windmill

[Outro: Tom DeLonge, Tom DeLonge & Mark Hoppus]
(Na-na, na-na, na-na, na-na, na, na)
Say it ain't so, I will not go
(Na-na, na-na, na-na, na-na, na, na)
Turn the lights off, carry me home
(Na-na, na-na, na-na, na-na, na, na)
Keep your head still, I'll be your thrill
(Na-na, na-na, na-na, na-na, na, na)
The night will go on, the night will go on, my little windmill

UNIriZ.name: Animal
UNIriZ.notes: 8T alle, 2 single git lines; 1T drums; 8T Str fast keine git, nur am Ende da da da; 8T Str fast keine git; 2T Stop auf subdominante; 14T Ref (6+8); 2t Auslauf Tonika ta ta ta; 8T Str ska-git; 8T Str ska-git; 14T Ref (6+8); 10T Interlude AAHHAAEHAA; 8T Intro; 4T Tonika, fast nur Bass, stop auf 3; 14T Ref (6+8); 16T Solo ; 14T Ref (6+8); Stop auf 1 Tonika
UNIriZ.lyrics_raw:
Here we go again
I kinda wanna be more than friends
So take it easy on me
I'm afraid you're never satisfied
Here we go again
We're sick like animals, we play pretend
You're just a cannibal
And I'm afraid I won't get out alive
No, I won't sleep tonight

[Chorus]
Oh-oh, I want some more
Oh-oh, what are you waiting for?
Take a bite of my heart tonight
Oh-oh, I want some more
Oh-oh, what are you waiting for?
What are you waiting for?
Say goodbye to my heart tonight

[Verse 2]
Here we are again
I feel the chemicals kickin' in
It's getting heavy and I wanna run and hide
I wanna run and hide
I do it every time
You're killin' me now
And I won't be denied by you
The animal inside of you

[Chorus]
Oh-oh, I want some more
Oh-oh, what are you waiting for?
Take a bite of my heart tonight
Oh-oh, I want some more
Oh-oh, what are you waiting for?
What are you waiting for?
Say goodbye to my heart tonight

[Bridge]
Hush, hush, the world is quiet
Hush, hush, we both can't fight it
It's us that made this mess
Why can't you understand?
Whoa, I won't sleep tonight
(I won't sleep tonight)

[Pre-Chorus]
Here we go again (Here we go again)
Here we go again

[Chorus]
Oh-oh, I want some more
Oh-oh, what are you waiting for?
Take a bite of my heart tonight
Oh-oh, I want some more
Oh-oh, what are you waiting for?
What are you waiting for?
What are you waiting—
Here we go again (Oh-oh, oh)
Here we go again (Oh-oh, oh)
Here we go again (Oh-oh, oh)
Say goodbye to my heart tonight
